summary: Commercial Property insurance covering buildings, contents, and stock against physical loss or damage. Key London Market line with significant Lloyd's syndicate participation. Complex survey and sum-insured adequacy requirements.

schemaEntities.description: Commercial property location. Custom: ConstructionClass, OccupancyCode, ProtectionGrade, BREEAM_Rating, FloodRisk_EA, SubsidenceRisk, NamedPerilsList, AgreedValue, ReinstatementBasis, SurveyRequired, SumInsuredAdequacy.
96 rules: sum insured adequacy checks, flood zone acceptance criteria, subsidence exclusion triggers, construction class rating, BREEAM discount eligibility.
Peril-based rating model. Separate rate tables per peril (fire, flood, subsidence, theft). 18 rate tables including EA flood map data.
Buildings coverage. Custom: ReinstatementValue, DebrisRemovalLimit, ArchitectsFees, TenantImprovements.

relationships.note: Coverage limits tied to location reinstatement value -- adequacy check required
Flood zone and subsidence rules reference EA data fields
Peril-split rating uses 8 location custom fields

migrationIssues.detail: Environment Agency flood risk data embedded in rate tables. GW Cloud requires external enrichment API -- EA data feed integration needed.
Separate rate tables per peril not natively supported in GW Cloud rating framework. Requires custom rating plugin or CloudRate restructure.
Adequacy check rules compare insured value vs rebuild cost index. GW Cloud supports limit validation but rebuild cost index integration needs mapping.
BREEAM sustainability rating discount logic. GW Cloud has no native sustainability discount -- custom discount table required.

cloudMapping.action: GW Cloud enrichment API -- EA flood map data feed integration required
No GW Cloud equivalent -- custom extension field required
Restructure peril tables to GW Cloud rating framework -- moderate effort
